documents.text: 分享 GitHub 上有趣、入门级的开源项目。Share interesting, entry-level open source projects on GitHub.
《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程，提供多种编程语言实现。
免费的计算机编程类中文书籍合集。
科技爱好者周刊，每周五发布。
收集小学、初中、高中和大学的 PDF 教材。
计算机科学自学指南和课程资源。
LLM 驱动的多市场股票分析系统，提供多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板和自动推送。
人人可用的多 Agent 舆情分析助手，用于还原舆情、预测走向和辅助决策。
完整保留排版的 PDF 科研论文双语翻译工具，支持命令行、图形界面和多种翻译服务。
全面深入的 Rust 中文学习教程，包含讲解、示例和完整语言知识。
Python tool for converting files and Office documents to Markdown.
An API to search, scrape, crawl, and interact with websites at scale.
An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting as an alternative to TeamViewer.
A modern cross-platform proxy GUI client built with Tauri for Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Toolkit to help software teams get started with Spec-Driven Development.
Transforms complex PDF and Office documents into LLM-ready Markdown and JSON.
A collection of Windows utilities that improve productivity and customization.
An open-source curriculum for learning mathematics, programming, and computer science.
A Rust command-line proxy that reduces language model token consumption for common development commands.
Turn any webpage into a lightweight desktop application with one command.
